notes: First sustained conviction 2004. KPK secured 95%+ conviction rate 2003-2014. Multiple ministers, parliamentarians, central bank governor, MK chief justice. Weakened in 2019 amendments (post-window).

Tafa Balogun plea 2005. First minister-level sustained conviction Alamieyeseigha 2007. Approximately 3 sustained convictions by 2008. Pattern of leadership turnover (Ribadu 2007 Waziri 2011 Magu 2020).
Paulo Roberto Costa plea 2014. Marcelo Odebrecht convicted 2016. Lula convicted 2017. 250+ total convictions 2014-2021. 2021 Supreme Court annulments. Operation wound down 2021.
First chairperson 2019. ~12000 complaints through 2023, single-digit sustained convictions. Censored at 10.

reform_name: Office of the Ombudsman and Auditor General
notes: Several senior officials convicted 2004-2008. Continuous RPF support. Developmental authoritarian framework caveat applies.
Roh Tae-woo and Chun Doo-hwan convicted 1996. Multiple chaebol prosecutions. Sustained prosecutorial independence.
5000+ indictments and ~1300 convictions through 1996. Craxi convicted 1994. Berlusconi-era pushback weakened follow-through by year 10.
Sustained high-profile convictions 1992-1996. Strong cross-party support during late colonial transition.
Najib Razak 1MDB convictions 2020 (11 years post-reform). No sustained minister-level convictions within 5-year window. Commissioner removals under political pressure.
Carpio-Morales tenure produced several high-profile convictions. Survived Duterte-era pressure.
Multiple prosecutions late 1990s and 2000s. Thaksin prosecutions began 2006. Coups 2006 and 2014 undermined coalition stability.

reform_name: International Commission Against Impunity in Guatemala
notes: Strong record 2007-2018. Otto Perez Molina indicted 2015. Dismantled 2019 by Morales administration.
Consolidated under Kovesi leadership 2013. Former PM Nastase convicted 2012. Weakened post-2018 with Kovesi removal.
Multiple Menem-era indictments through 2000s. Menem convicted 2013 (illegal arms exports). Multiple political-coalition shifts.
Multiple former presidents indicted 2017-2019. Continuous prosecutorial independence despite presidential turnover.
Through 2023 no sustained high-profile cabinet-level convictions.
Extensive findings 2018-2022 but no sustained high-profile state-capture-related convictions through 2023.
Martin Amidu resigned 2020 citing executive interference. No sustained minister-level convictions.

reform_name: Office National de Lutte Contre la Fraude et la Corruption
notes: Karim Wade convicted 2015 via separate court. Limited sustained convictions thereafter.
Several former ministers indicted under Sata 2011-2015. Political weaponisation under PF reduced credibility.
Bo Xilai convicted 2013. Zhou Yongkang convicted 2015. Hundreds of senior officials convicted 2012-2017. Authoritarian framework caveat applies.
Politburo members investigated and convicted 2018-2021 including Dinh La Thang. Continues through 2023. Authoritarian framework caveat applies.
